description: Conservative draft follow-up reports generated from background report-readiness records.
disclaimer: Background draft follow-up reports are conservative internal summaries for review-ready records; they are not discoveries, detections, external validation, or authorization to submit externally.

draft_reports.report_title: Conservative follow-up report draft for target-radio-clean-drift
draft_reports.abstract: target-radio-clean-drift is a local, fixture-backed follow-up target with completed mandatory checks. This draft preserves uncertainty and does not claim a confirmed technosignature.
draft_reports.methodology_summary: Summary generated from the background report-readiness fixture; it uses local records only and preserves conservative pathway gates.
evidence_supporting_follow_up: report-readiness gate is ready for draft preparation
mandatory local follow-up tests are complete
negative_evidence: external submission is not allowed by the readiness gate
no external validation has been recorded
false positives remain the default hypothesis
uncertainty_and_limitations: all evidence is fixture-backed and local-only
no external validation or live observation has been performed
blocking_issues: human approval is required before any external submission
recommended_next_steps: human reviewer inspects the draft report
decide whether to request more tests or close as reviewed
keep external submission disabled unless the user explicitly approves
